release_notes: v0.9.3 — Trends charts now mark the dates when a brand, alias, or prompt family changed, so a real shift in AI visibility can be told apart from a chart moving just because what's being tracked changed. Visibility Collection now stays awake through a long run instead of letting Windows put the PC to sleep mid-collection. New Brand Sentiment & Recommendations columns distinguish AI actively recommending a brand from just mentioning it alongside others. Home's Recent Activity no longer floods with a wall of prompt-set names for large collection runs. Expanded automated test coverage across PDF/Excel/Word report generation.
